title: Remote Work Policy
content: Remote Work Policy: Employees may work remotely up to 3 days per week with manager approval. Fully remote arrangements require VP-level approval. Remote employees must maintain regular availability during core hours (10 AM - 4 PM).

title: Travel Reimbursement Guidelines
content: Travel reimbursement: Domestic travel up to ₹25,000 requires manager approval. International travel requires VP approval. All bookings must be made through the corporate travel portal. Economy class is standard for flights under 4 hours.
